In his debut match for Liverpool (Premier League, August 9, 2015, vs. Stoke City), the only goal was scored by Philippe Coutinho, but the question asks for a debut match with an own goal. Searching further, in the 2016-17 season, Liverpool's debut match was against Arsenal, where Theo Walcott scored for Arsenal, but no own goal. However, in the 2017-18 season, Mohamed Salah made his Liverpool debut against Watford, and in that match, Watford's player Miguel Britos scored an own goal.
